title: Botanypots & Cobblemon berries
description: As the title suggests this datapack is designed to allow berries from Cobblemon to be compatible with the Botanypots mod! Happy farming!
body:
This datapack is designed to allow compatibility between Botanypots and Cobblemon's berries. I'm aware that this has already been done for the apricorn trees in another pack, however, I haven't seen if the author of that pack shall be doing so for the new version. This is for Cobblemon v1.4. Happy farming!

Mints to come once I figure out why they aren't working
